name: Olive Garden Brownie Banana Funtastico
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare brownie mix according to package directions.
2. Beat whipped topping mix and 1/2 cup milk with an electric mixer for 5 minutes.
3. Transfer the beaten mixture to a separate bowl and set aside.
4. Add pudding mix and 1 cup milk to the brownie mix bowl. Mix on low speed for 2 minutes.
5. Fold the whipped topping into the pudding mixture by hand or on very low speed until well combined.
6. Chill the mixture while assembling banana splits.
7. Place a brownie in the bottom of a large bowl.
8. Spread pineapple topping over the brownie.
9. Split a banana lengthwise and place it next to the brownie on either side.
10. Place desired amount of banana mousse on top of the brownie.
11. Top with whipped cream, chocolate topping, nuts, and a cherry.
Source: The Olive Garden.
